ValidationRule.description: When lowRentStartYear == lowRentEndYear and lowSeasonMonth > lowEndMonth then display the below error message
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Rent_Type__c, 'Seasonal Rent'), OR(VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Year__c) > VALUE(leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Year__c), AND(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Year__c == leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Year__c , CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Low_Season_Start_Month__c), 'January',1, 'February',2, 'March',3, 'April',4, 'May',5, 'June',6, 'July',7, 'August',8, 'September',9, 'October',10, 'November',11, 12) > CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Low_Season_End_Month__c), 'January',1, 'February',2, 'March',3, 'April',4, 'May',5, 'June',6, 'July',7, 'August',8, 'September',9, 'October',10, 'November',11, 12))))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Low Season ending date must be later than Low Season starting date. Please correct your date selections.
